brand.name: MRNote
hero.title: The AI notebook that remembers your clients.
hero.sub: Persistent memory across every session. Automatic follow-up reminders. Weekly reflections. Built for consultants, freelancers, and solopreneurs running 10 to 50 client relationships.
exclusiveSection.emptyTitle: Pick your role to unlock tailored content
exclusiveSection.emptyHint: Tell us what you do; we'll show the right demo, templates, and offers.
exclusiveSection.statLineSuffix: {role}s already use MRNote as their daily {noun}
problem.title: Your client list keeps growing. Your brain doesn't scale.
problem.item1.title: Scattered notes
problem.item1.body: Notion, Apple Notes, Slack DMs, email threads — context lives everywhere except where you need it.
problem.item2.title: Lost context
problem.item2.body: "What did Sarah say about pricing last quarter?" Fifteen minutes searching, still no answer.
problem.item3.title: Dropped follow-ups
problem.item3.body: Twelve clients you haven't touched in 30 days. You notice when they churn — not before.
features.title: Three things MRNote does that a notes app can't.
feature1.title: Memory that persists across every session
feature1.body: Type "what did Sarah say about pricing last quarter" — get the answer. MRNote automatically extracts commitments, preferences, and key facts from every client conversation and files them in a structured memory graph.
feature1.bullets.0: Auto-extracted from calls, notes, and docs
feature1.bullets.1: Query in natural language, cited to source
feature1.bullets.2: Private by default, never used to train models
feature2.title: Never drop a client again
feature2.body: Last call, you promised Lisa a proposal by Friday. Tomorrow is Friday — MRNote reminds you. 45 days since you talked to David — MRNote surfaces him before he drifts away.
feature2.bullets.2: Snooze, mark done, or reschedule in one click
feature3.title: 30-second Monday reflection
feature3.body: Every Monday, MRNote sends a digest: what you did last week, who you talked to, what's overdue, where your work drifted from goals. Read it in thirty seconds. Close the week open.
feature3.bullets.0: Auto-generated summary of the past week
feature3.bullets.2: Goal drift detection across your top clients
screenshot.title: A canvas, not a file tree.
screenshot.sub: Drag any document, memory, or digest onto the whiteboard. Keep three clients open side-by-side without losing your place.
pricing.title: Simple pricing. Start free.
pricing.sub: Free forever on the basics. Upgrade when you need more.

og.title: MRNote — The AI notebook that remembers your clients
og.description: Stop losing client context. MRNote gives independent consultants persistent AI memory, automatic follow-up reminders, and weekly reflections — all in one notebook.
pricingPage.meta.title: Pricing
pricingPage.hero.title: Priced for independent operators.
pricingPage.hero.sub: Free forever on the basics. Upgrade when you grow. Cancel any time — your notebooks stay with you.
pricingPage.compare.title: Compare plans
pricingPage.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
pricingPage.faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricingPage.faq.a1: No. Free is free forever — no card required. Pro comes with a 14-day free trial, and you'll only be charged if you decide to continue.
pricingPage.faq.q2: Can I pay with Alipay or WeChat Pay?
pricingPage.faq.a2: Yes, for one-time annual payments. Recurring subscriptions via Alipay and WeChat Pay are coming soon. Global cards are supported today.
pricingPage.faq.a3: You keep every notebook, every note, every memory. Your account moves to Free at the end of the current billing cycle — nothing is deleted.
pricingPage.faq.a4: Yes. Your notes, memories, and conversations are never used to train models — ours or anyone else's. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
pricingPage.faq.a5: Yes, any time. Export individual notebooks or your entire workspace as Markdown or JSON. Your data belongs to you.
pricingPage.faq.a6: Team is per-seat — the workspace owner pays for the whole team at $15 per seat per month. Members keep their own memory and notebooks, plus a shared workspace.
pricingPage.faq.q7: Do you offer a student discount?
pricingPage.faq.a7: Not today. If you're a student and cost is a barrier, email us at hello@mingrun-tech.com — we figure something out case by case.
pricingPage.faq.a8: Pro includes a 14-day free trial instead. That's a full two weeks to decide whether MRNote is worth the ten dollars before a charge happens.
